LanguageData.Seg_WOTV_RogueTraderTitle_LetterBody:
{PAWN_labelShort} is now the bearer of the sacred Warrant of Trade by all laws and traditions of {FACTION_name}!

The Warrant grants {PAWN_labelShort} the title of Rogue Trader, and with it Imperial right of settlement on this very rimworld, as well as privileges and leniencies enjoyed by only a select few among humanity's masses. All hail the Emperor's anointed. All hail the Rogue Trader!

An heir to the title - or, Emperor forbid, a new bearer - can be chosen by selecting your Warrant of Trade.
